{{CargoRelic
|name=Marconi Telegraph
|class_id=21315
|rank=AA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=11-15
|source=
|description=On Nov 15, 1896 AD, Guglielmo Marconi invented the telegraph system when he was only in his twenties.<br>The Marconi Telegraph works because the electrical magnetic waves generated by sounds can be detected by a coherer. Once the electromagnetic wave passes through, the materials inside the device turn into a good electrical conductor that can display regular radio signals. The message can be interpreted with a special telegraph code. Marconi kept improving the device and increased the distance of transmission from a few meters to 50 km.
[Patent]
Patent Certificate No.: 7777.
|fame=47
|art=36
|fth=30
|civ=48
|tech=67
|ss1=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +4<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +4
|ss2=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +8<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +8
|ss3=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +12<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +12
|ss4=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +20<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +20
|ss5=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +28<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +28
|ss7=Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop DEF +28<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +28<br>Per 30 Mecha Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +28 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: This Relic's TECH +10
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill II.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, 2x Purple Reagent Drops +7.5%
}}
